title: CENTCOM shoots down 2 more IRGC drones threatening Hormuz maritime traffic (June 7) — second consecutive day, no US strike on Iranian territory
snippet: US Central Command shot down two more one-way attack drones threatening maritime traffic in the Strait of Hormuz. This is the second consecutive day of Iranian drone launches toward the waterway (after the June 5-6 cycle). Unlike June 5, no US strike on Iranian territory was reported in the 24 hours to June 7. The pattern of IRGC provocations in Hormuz continues but without the full escalation cycle seen on June 5-6. Source: ABC News.
tag_reason: Continuation of CENTCOM-IRGC Hormuz drone cycle; update from June 5-6 pattern without further escalation to radar strikes
